headline: CooperVision Launches MADE BETTER™ Promise Beginning with MyDay® Contact Lenses*¹
summary: CooperVision announced today the launch of its MADE BETTER™ Promise—a new global sustainability platform focused on smarter, more sustainable choices.*†1 Built on years of CooperVision innovation in sustainability, MADE BETTER™ Promise is woven throughout the life of participating products, beginning with the MyDay® daily disposable family of contact lenses.*†1
